---
format: html
---
```{python}
import ipywidgets as widgets

# Define questions and answers
questions = [
    "What is the capital of France?",
    "What is the largest planet in our solar system?",
    "What is the chemical symbol for water?"
]
answers = [
    "Paris",
    "Jupiter",
    "H2O"
]

# Create widget for question display
question_widget = widgets.Label(value=questions[0])

# Create widget for answer selection
answer_widget = widgets.RadioButtons(
    options=answers,
    description='Select an answer:',
    disabled=False
)

# Create widget for submit button
submit_button = widgets.Button(description="Submit Answer")

# Function to check answer
def check_answer(b):
    user_answer = answer_widget.value
    correct_answer = answers[questions.index(question_widget.value)]
    if user_answer == correct_answer:
        feedback_widget.value = "Correct!"
    else:
        feedback_widget.value = "Incorrect. Try again."

# Event handler for submit button
submit_button.on_click(check_answer)

# Widget for displaying feedback
feedback_widget = widgets.Label()

# Display widgets
display(question_widget, answer_widget, submit_button, feedback_widget)
```
